: Saved
:
ASA Version 9.16(4)
!
hostname asa-edge-01
domain-name example.invalid
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 nameif outside
 security-level 0
 ip address 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 nameif inside
 security-level 100
 ip address 10.1.1.1 255.255.255.0
!
object network web-server
 host 10.1.1.10
object network db-server
 host 10.1.1.20
object network dmz-net
 subnet 10.2.0.0 255.255.0.0
!
object-group network DMZ-NETS
 network-object 10.2.0.0 255.255.0.0
 network-object host 10.1.1.10
object-group service WEB-SVC tcp
 port-object eq www
 port-object eq https
object-group network INTERNAL-NETS
 network-object 10.0.0.0 255.0.0.0
!
access-list outside_in extended permit tcp any host web-server eq www
access-list outside_in extended permit tcp any host web-server eq https
access-list outside_in extended permit tcp any host db-server eq 3306
access-list outside_in extended permit icmp any any echo-reply
access-list outside_in extended deny ip any any log
access-list inside_out extended permit ip any any
!
nat (inside,outside) source dynamic any interface
nat (inside,outside) source static web-server web-server-pub
nat (inside,outside) source static db-server db-server-pub service tcp 3306 3306
!
access-group outside_in in interface outside
access-group inside_out in interface inside
!
: end
